execution_summary: Docker environment built with R 4.2.2 and tidyverse. Fixed data-prep script paths and duplicate code, ensured working directory correct, appended call to analysis script. After two debugging loops (syntax error, path error), reran and hierarchical regression executed without error. Aligns with preregistration; Model_3 focal test ran.

code_executed.logs: Initial build ok. First run: syntax error from duplicated rm(list). Fixed. Second run: file path error for Raw data. Added working directory adjustment and correct path. Third run: completed without errors. Stdout not captured by orchestrator; regression summary printed in container.
code_executed.environment: Docker container based on rocker/r-ver:4.2.2 with tidyverse 1.3.2

results.hypothesis_tested: Higher weekend relaxation (Time-2) predicts higher joviality at the end of next work-week (Time-3), controlling for baseline joviality and covariates.

findings_summary.outcome_name: Standardised coefficient β for req_relax in Model_3
findings_summary.statistical_significance: p value to be inspected (criterion p_one-tailed < .05)
